title: Senior Financial Analyst - MobiKwik - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - MobiKwik - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!
